system.descriptor: Common Lore represents general knowledge about a particular subject that is widely known within the Imperium. Each specialisation is a separate skill.
system.uses:
Uses: Recalling commonly known facts about an organisation, culture, or subject. More obscure information requires more Degrees of Success.
Common Lore tests represent knowledge that an educated or well-travelled Imperial citizen might know. Highly specific or secret information falls under Scholastic Lore or Forbidden Lore instead.
Specialisations: Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Arbites, Adeptus Astra Telepathica, Adeptus Mechanicus, Administratum, Ecclesiarchy, Imperial Creed, Imperial Guard, Imperial Navy, Imperium, Tech, Underworld, War. Each specialisation must be taken separately as a distinct skill.
